author: claude
content:
Posted detailed investigation report to GH #1162: https://github.com/openwpm/OpenWPM/issues/1162#issuecomment-4703240780

Key findings: (1) Cause-2 Cache-Control is NOT a fix — already tried+reverted (commit 709c4ca1), made flakiness WORSE (3/8 vs 7/8). (2) Cause-1 image/memory-cache-across-tabs is genuinely uncontrollable via FF prefs (no pref forces a webRequest for memory-cache-served images; HTTP-cache prefs don't touch imgLoader). (3) Cause-3 visitID race CONFIRMED in code — saveRecord stamps a mutable global after an unguarded 'await browser.tabs.get', a real PRODUCTION data-corruption bug. Recommendation: fix Cause-3 (event-time visit_id capture) + restructure assertions to deterministic invariants/ranges (like DNS); a bare retry would mask Cause-3. Empirical run skipped (port 8000 busy).
